{{Quote|Like all Hutts, Darga is a slimy gangster whose love of credits is exceeded only by his love of power.|Gilder Varth|<ref name="A Wretched Hive (Dawn of Defiance)">{{DoD|A Wretched Hive (adventure)}}</ref>}}
'''Darga Jiramma Mionne''' was a young [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] who carved out a small empire on [[Cato Neimoidia/Legends|Cato Neimoidia]]. Though he was nowhere near as successful or mighty as other members of his clan, he believed that his dealings with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] would put him on a fast track to power. Darga believed that as the Empire's influence grew, so would that of its allies.

==Biography==
He once held the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Denia]] captive. Later, he worked with the [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisitor]] [[Valin Draco]]. Darga had a large interest in the [[Tibanna/Legends|Tibanna gas]] industry, and used it to get [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

After his palace was raided by undercover [[Alderaanian Resistance/Legends|Alderaanian Resistance]], who killed his [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] majordomo, [[Igren Demos]], Darga fled to the [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] system, where he hid his luxury yacht, the ''[[Glorious Chariot]]'', and went into hiding. Shortly after a [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] tournament, the rebels who overthrew his palace found him. He was defeated on [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] by the rebel group, which proceeded to take his yacht and six [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]], during the [[Battle of Bespin (Imperial Period)|Battle of Bespin]] several months after the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].
